empirical_clue.human_level_observation: Conscious reasoning can operate over visual, tactile, language, and other modality inputs in one analyzable stream.

core_inference.supported: there is some shared low-dimensional reasoning-compatible structure across modalities
core_inference.not_supported: one fully shared global central loop is sufficient
core_inference.more_plausible_form: modality-conditioned entry into a family-conditioned shared reasoning slice

relation_to_icspb.interpretation: Conscious unification is better read as a path-conditioned reasoning slice inside ICSPB rather than a single universal processing core.

verdict.core_answer: The consciousness clue supports a shared reasoning-compatible substrate, but only after modality-conditioned and family-conditioned lifting.
verdict.next_theory_target: formalize a modality-unified reasoning law inside ICSPB.
